exercises: Nonexistent SOURCE: DESCRIPTION says "Rename SOURCE to DEST, or move SOURCE(s) to DIRECTORY."
expected: The utility exits with a nonzero status.

exercises: Missing required operands: SYNOPSIS documents only forms requiring SOURCE DEST, SOURCE... DIRECTORY, or -t DIRECTORY SOURCE...
expected: The utility exits with a nonzero status.

exercises: Missing DEST/DIRECTORY: SYNOPSIS documents no one-operand form; it requires SOURCE DEST, SOURCE... DIRECTORY, or -t DIRECTORY SOURCE...
expected: The utility exits with a nonzero status.

exercises: -t requires DIRECTORY: manpage says "-t, --target-directory=DIRECTORY move all SOURCE arguments into DIRECTORY" and "Mandatory arguments to long options are mandatory for short options too."
expected: The utility exits with a nonzero status.

exercises: --target-directory requires DIRECTORY: manpage says "-t, --target-directory=DIRECTORY move all SOURCE arguments into DIRECTORY."
expected: The utility exits with a nonzero status.

exercises: -t DIRECTORY requires an actual directory: manpage says "-t, --target-directory=DIRECTORY move all SOURCE arguments into DIRECTORY."
expected: The utility exits with a nonzero status.

exercises: -T with directory target: manpage says "-T, --no-target-directory treat DEST as a normal file."
expected: The utility exits with a nonzero status.

exercises: --update=none-fail: manpage says skipped files "are diagnosed and induce a failure."
expected: The utility exits with a nonzero status.

exercises: Invalid empty UPDATE value: manpage restricts UPDATE to "{all,none,none-fail,older(default)}".
expected: The utility exits with a nonzero status.

exercises: --update=none: documented as like --no-clobber, with no destination files replaced and skipped files not inducing failure.
expected: The destination file keeps its original contents.

exercises: --update=all: documented as resulting in all existing files in the destination being replaced.
expected: The destination file contains the source contents.

exercises: -n/--no-clobber: documented to not overwrite an existing file.
expected: The destination file keeps its original contents.

exercises: Final overwrite option wins: manpage says if more than one of -i, -f, -n is specified, only the final one takes effect.
expected: The destination file is overwritten because -f is final.

exercises: Final overwrite option wins: manpage says if more than one of -i, -f, -n is specified, only the final one takes effect.
expected: The destination file is not overwritten because -n is final.
